Bash(python -c "
import sys
import io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

from pptx import Presentation

path = r'C:/Users/dnftk/Documents/2025_광탱영림_크로스_프로젝트/1_계열화사업소개_및_자동화_필요한부분_요청.pptx'
prs = Presentation\(path\)

for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides, 1\):
    print\(f'=== 슬라이드 {i} ==='\)
    for shape in slide.shapes:
        if shape.has_text_frame:
            for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
                text = para.text.strip\(\)
                if text:
                    print\(text\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

path = "C:/Users/dnftk/Documents/2025_광탱영림_크로스_프로젝트/1_사육두수집계표/2025_위탁사육두수집계표.xlsx"
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(path, data_only=True\)

# Examine first sheet thoroughly - print all rows
sheet_name = wb.sheetnames[0]
ws = wb[sheet_name]
print\(f"=== Sheet: {sheet_name} ==="\)
print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}"\)
print\(f"Max row: {ws.max_row}, Max col: {ws.max_column}"\)
print\(\)

# Print first 30 rows
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=30, values_only=True\):
    # Only print rows that have some content
    if any\(cell is not None for cell in row\):
        print\(row\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
import sys
import re

sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

path = "C:/Users/dnftk/Documents/2025_광탱영림_크로스_프로젝트/1_사육두수집계표/2025_위탁사육두수집계표.xlsx"
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(path, data_only=True\)

# Check for 대성농장, 강변축산 - they had 마준언 early but 신현준\(카길\) later?
# Also check all appearances of 대성농장 and 강변축산
print\("=== 대성농장 appearances \(manager col\) ==="\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    if '진호양돈' in sheet_name:
        continue
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    seen = set\(\)
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=ws.max_row, values_only=True\):
        farm = row[1] if len\(row\) > 1 else None
        mgr = row[4] if len\(row\) > 4 else None
        if farm in \('대성농장', '강변축산'\) and isinstance\(mgr, str\):
            k = \(sheet_name, farm, mgr\)
            if k not in seen:
                seen.add\(k\)
                print\(f"  {sheet_name} | {farm} | mgr: {mgr}"\)
PYEOF)
